cards.title: Jensen Huang: $200B AI CPU Market Ahead
cards.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang predicts the next major opportunity lies in CPUs designed for AI agents, worth around $200 billion. This represents a significant pivot from GPU-dominated AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Anthropic Eyes First Profitable Quarter
cards.body: Anthropic projects more than doubling revenue to $10.9 billion in Q2, signaling a path to profitability. The company continues scaling its AI operations amid competitive market pressures.

cards.title: xAI Lost $6.4B in 2025, Expanding
cards.body: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals Elon Musk's xAI burned $6.4 billion last year while planning massive expansion. The company is purchasing $2.8 billion in natural gas turbines for additional compute capacity.

cards.title: Nvidia Posts Record Quarter, Reveals Startup Portfolio
cards.body: Nvidia announced record revenue but forecasted slower growth in the next quarter. The company revealed $43 billion in holdings across AI startups.

cards.title: Anthropic Pays xAI $1.25B Monthly for Compute
cards.body: Elon Musk's xAI struck a surprising deal to provide compute resources to competitor Anthropic. The arrangement is valued at $1.25 billion per month.

cards.title: OpenAI Claims Solving 80-Year Math Problem
cards.body: OpenAI's reasoning model allegedly disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946. Mathematicians who previously exposed OpenAI's errors are backing this claim.

cards.title: Andrew Ng-Backed IrisGo Launches AI Desktop Assistant
cards.body: IrisGo watches users' desktop activity and automatically learns to automate routine tasks. The startup positions itself as an AI butler for personal productivity.

cards.title: OpenAI Accelerates IPO Plans for September
cards.body: After winning its lawsuit against Elon Musk, OpenAI is reportedly resuming IPO preparations. The company may go public as early as September 2026.

cards.title: AI Search Startups Become Hot Investment Target
cards.body: AI-powered search has quietly emerged as one of the most attractive consumer AI opportunities. Multiple startups are competing to disrupt traditional search.

cards.title: Stability AI Releases Audio Model 3.0
cards.body: Stability Audio 3.0 can generate two-minute tracks and runs on-device for efficiency. The smaller model enables music creation without cloud dependencies.

cards.title: NanoClaw Founder Rejects $20M Buyout, Raises $12M
cards.body: NanoClaw, a secure alternative to OpenClaw, was created for AI marketing agents working on complex tasks. The startup chose independent funding over acquisition.

cards.title: Figma Adds AI Agent to Design Canvas
cards.body: Figma users can now employ natural language prompts to direct AI agents for design generation and editing. The feature automates design iteration workflows.

cards.title: Google Declares AI Design Contender at IO 2026
cards.body: Google announced AI design tools built for accessibility, targeting teachers and small business owners. The company is positioning itself as a serious design AI player.

cards.title: Gmail Gets Conversational Voice Search via Gemini
cards.body: Google expanded Gmail's AI Inbox with conversational voice capabilities powered by Gemini. Users can now verbally ask the AI to find buried email details.

cards.title: Google Launches Agentic AI Information Monitors
cards.body: Google is deploying AI-powered information agents that monitor topics and proactively alert users to updates. These agents go beyond standard search paradigms.

cards.title: Ocean Raises $28M to Fight AI Email Phishing
cards.body: Ocean's agentic email security platform uses AI to analyze email context for fraud and impersonation detection. The startup claims comprehensive threat analysis capabilities.

cards.title: Musk Loses OpenAI Lawsuit, Trial Confirms Weak Case
cards.body: A jury unanimously rejected Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI founders, ruling his claims barred by statute of limitations. The trial revealed Musk and Altman had similar strategic aims.

cards.title: Here's Why Elon Musk Lost OpenAI Lawsuit
cards.body: The jury found Musk sued too late, with his claims falling outside applicable statutes of limitations. Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers immediately accepted the advisory verdict.

cards.title: Google Search Remake with Agentic AI in 2026
cards.body: Google is set to fundamentally transform search using agentic AI capabilities. The shift represents a major evolution in how users will interact with search.

cards.title: Figure AI Humanoid Robots Wow Internet Handlers
cards.body: Figure AI's humanoid robots handling packages have captured internet attention with their capabilities. The videos showcase significant advances in robotic dexterity.
